case_title: KERRY M KENNELLY VS. VICTOR D BORI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) - OUT OF STATE (FLORIDA)PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED NOV-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BORI, VICTOR D

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNELLY, KERRY M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BORI, VICTOR D THE ALLOCATION OF COMMUNITY DEBT DURING MARRIAGE IS WITHIN THE JURISDICTION OF THE FAMILY LAW COURT. IN THAT REGARD, THE JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION OF MARRIAGE STATES THAT THERE WERE NO COMMUNITY DEBTS TO BE DIVIDED BY THE PARTIES, AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT IN THE DISSOLUTION ACTION STATED THAT THE PETITIONER DID NOT REQUEST MONEY, PROPERTY OR COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,748.00 FILED BY KENNELLY, KERRY M AS TO DEFENDANT BORI, VICTOR D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
